subject.description: Late-30s man, same stubble, but posture completely changed — leaning back in chair, shoulders loose, one arm hanging off armrest. Clean white t-shirt. Rested face.
subject.action: Reading output on a single clean laptop screen with left hand resting loosely on trackpad. Eyes scanning with a slight upward tilt — the posture of someone reviewing, not scrambling. Upper lip barely pulled back asymmetrically on one side — the involuntary start of approval before he's decided anything.

setting.location: Clean minimal home office desk — one laptop, one notebook closed beside it, a fresh coffee. No clutter. Window light coming in from the left. Plants visible softly blurred in background.
setting.time_of_day: Morning — soft golden window light from the left.

composition.camera_angle: Slight low angle — camera below eye-line looking slightly up, conveying calm authority
composition.framing: Small medium shot. Crown with headspace at top. Cut below nipples. Subject centered with slight right lean. Never cut in flesh.

lighting.type: Soft natural window light from the left, gentle fill from the right. No harsh shadows.
lighting.color_grading: Cinematic teal-orange grade — warm amber morning tones, blue shadows preserved in corners. Skin tones protected and warm.

mood: Calm decisive focus — the specific stillness of someone who has stopped doing the work and started reviewing it instead.
aesthetic_style: Shot on Sony A7 with 80mm lens. Cinematic teal-orange color grade — warm morning light, blue-pushed shadows. Real environment. Skin pores visible. Subject caught mid-review, NOT posed. Looks like a still from a prestige documentary or drama series.
